reviewableAssetModel: Each product-offering placement maps to its bundled paid kit PDF and DOCX. All paid products are direct paid downloads. The site does not sell each offering as a separate checkout product.

contracts.customerSituation: You need a self-service credit explanation letter you can prepare with truthful facts before you send your paperwork.
contracts.ctaLabel: Use the Letter of Explanation Kit — $39
contracts.riskBoundary: Use true facts only. ApprovalPrep does not create fake documents, contact third parties, or promise approval.

standard.requiredCustomerValue: The offering must map to a named self-service customer situation and a concrete paid kit.

contracts.proofBoundary: This contract proves catalog, docs, asset, direct-download model, and boundary coverage. It does not prove a human has manually reviewed every word inside the generated PDF/DOCX after each future edit.
